transcript:
Speaker A: കഴുതേ! English ഇൽ ഒരു sentence പോലും നിനക്ക് ക്ലയന്റിന്റെ അടുത്ത് പറയാൻ പറ്റുന്നില്ല. You are fired! [Donkey! You can't even say a single sentence in English to the client. You are fired!]
Speaker B: നീ MySivi ആപ്പ് യൂസ് ചെയ്തു നോക്ക്. എനിക്ക് ഇതിൽ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പഠിച്ചാ ജോലി ശരിയായത്. [You try using MySivi app. I got a job after learning English from this.]
Speaker C: My English... very bad. Help me.
Speaker D: Don't worry, I will help you. Practice with me.
Speaker C: So I actually had the most amazing bowl of ramen this morning. The broth was so rich...
Speaker C: Yes, I was fired from my last job because I couldn't speak English. However, I worked diligently to improve, and I believe my progress speaks for itself.
Speaker E: You are hired!
on_screen_text:
കഴുതേ [Donkey]
English ഇൽ ഒരു sentence പോലും നിനക്ക് ക്ലയന്റിന്റെ അടുത്ത് പറയാൻ പറ്റുന്നില്ല [You can't even say a single sentence in English to the client]
You are fired
MySivi
നീ MySivi ആപ്പ് യൂസ് ചെയ്തു നോക്ക് [You try using MySivi app]
എനിക്ക് ഇതിൽ ഇംഗ്ലീഷ് പഠിച്ചാ ജോലി ശരിയായത് [I got a job after learning English from this]
Day 1
My English very bad help me
Don't worry I will help you Practice with me
Day 15
Day 30
yes I was fired from my last job because I couldn't speak English
I worked diligently to improve and I believe my progress speaks for itself
you are hired
Start your journey with MySivi now
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An animated Malayalam ad depicting a man who gets fired due to poor English skills. After a friend recommends the MySivi app, he practices daily and successfully lands a new job in 30 days. The ad promotes MySivi as an effective tool for career advancement through English learning.
